title: Chopping Board Oil 100% Mineral Oil 250ml Food Grade Mineral Oil, Chopping Board Oil, Butcher Block Oil, Food Safe Wood Oil for Boards Butcher Blocks & Wooden Bowls Vegan Friendly (250ml)
features: FOOD SAFE CHOPPING BOARD OIL: Designed to hydrate, restore and protect food preparation surfaces including chopping boards, butcher blocks, wooden bowls and wooden utensils
COLOURLESS, ODOURLESS & TASTELESS MINERAL OIL: So you can enjoy the benefits of this chopping board oil without experiencing any unpleasantries to your sense of smell or taste.
VEGETARIAN & VEGAN FRIENDLY: No animal products are found inside this food grade mineral oil and no animal testing has been undertaken in order to produce this chopping board oil
100% FOOD GRADE MINERAL OIL: There are no hidden extras contained in this chopping board oil, so you can be confident that your wellbeing is our top priority
CHOPPING BOARD OIL IS GREAT FOR USE ON: Oak, cherry, acacia, beech, maple, walnut, pine, teak, bamboo plus many more types of wood chopping boards, butcher blocks, wooden bowls and wooden utensils
MADE IN THE UK & FULLY COMPLIANT: This chopping board oil complies with European Pharmacopoeia and USA FDA 21 CFR 178.3620 (a) and 21 CFR 172.878
description: Product Description FOOD GRADE MINERAL OIL FOR CHOPPING BOARDS HemBorta Chopping Board Oil is made from 100% mineral oil, this food grade mineral oil is specifically designed for use on chopping boards, butcher blocks and wooden bowls. CHOPPING BOARD OIL THAT HYDRATES RESTORES & PROTECTS Hydrates chopping boards to help prevent cracking and splitting - while providing a defensive lining to protect the board from liquids, germs & bacteria. It further penetrates the wooden surface to help to restore the natural colour and look of your chopping board. MINERAL OIL SUITABLE FOR VARIOUS WOOD TYPES This mineral oil is extremely versatile and great for use on various wood types including oak, cherry, acacia, beech, maple, walnut and bamboo to name but a few types. COMPLIANT CHOPPING BOARD OIL MADE IN THE UK This food safe wood oil made in the UK and is fully compliant with European Pharmacopoeia and USA FDA 21 CFR 178.3620 (a) and 21 CFR 172.878. VEGETARIAN & VEGAN FRIENDLY CHOPPING BOARD OIL No animal products are found inside this food grade mineral oil and no animal testing has been undertaken in order to produce this product HemBorta Chopping Board Oil is made from 100% mineral oil, this food grade mineral oil is specifically designed for use on chopping boards, butcher blocks and wooden bowls - as it HYDRATES RESTORES and PROTECTS your food preparation surfaces with ease. Made in the UK, this food safe wood oil is fully compliant with European Pharmacopoeia and USA FDA 21 CFR 178.3620 (a) and 21 CFR 172.878 . It is also vegetarian and vegan friendly with no animal products contained inside this product and zero animal testing undertaken. FOOD SAFE CHOPPING BOARD OIL: Designed to hydrate, restore and protect food preparation surfaces including chopping boards, butcher blocks, wooden bowls and wooden utensils COLOURLESS, ODOURLESS & TASTELESS MINERAL OIL: So you can enjoy the benefits of this chopping board oil without experiencing any unpleasantries to your sense of smell or taste. VEGETARIAN & VEGAN FRIENDLY: No animal products are found inside this food grade mineral oil and no animal testing has been undertaken in order to produce this chopping board oil 100% FOOD GRADE MINERAL OIL: There are no hidden extras contained in this chopping board oil, so you can be confident that your wellbeing is our top priority CHOPPING BOARD OIL IS GREAT FOR USE ON: Oak, cherry, acacia, beech, maple, walnut, pine, teak, bamboo plus many more types of wood chopping boards, butcher blocks, wooden bowls and wooden utensils MADE IN THE UK & FULLY COMPLIANT: This chopping board oil complies with European Pharmacopoeia and USA FDA 21 CFR 178.3620 (a) and 21 CFR 172.878 CHOPPING BOARD OIL THAT IS SAFE TO USE: This chopping board oil is safe to use on any wooden chopping board for food preparation. It will not affect the taste, appearance or smell of your food when you are preparing your dishes at home. FOOD GRADE MINERAL OIL THAT HYDRATES: If you are tired of your cutting board either cracking, splitting or looking dishevelled, then our cutting board oil will help to prevent this. It will help the wooden board maintain hydration and stay looking like new. 100% MINERAL OIL THAT PROTECTS: Our mineral oil will create a lining that protects the board from being damaged by liquids and other germs or bacteria. This will help to increase the lifespan of your chopping board. FOOD SAFE OIL THAT RESTORES: Our food grade slate oil will penetrate the surface of your wooden chopping board and help to restore the natural colour and look of your board. 250ml Chopping Board Oil 500ml Chopping Board Oil Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 453 4.6 out of 5 stars 453 Price £7.95 £ 7 . 95 £9.95 £ 9 . 95 Chopping board oil purpose Designed to hydrate restore and protect chopping boards, butcher blocks and wooden bowls etc. Designed to hydrate restore and protect chopping boards, butcher blocks and wooden bowls etc. Food grade mineral oil ✓ ✓ Country of production UK UK Colourless ✓ ✓ Odourless ✓ ✓ Tasteless ✓ ✓ Made from 100% Mineral oil 100% Mineral oil Vegetarian friendly ✓ ✓ Vegan friendly ✓ ✓ Fully compliant with European Pharmacopoeia and USA FDA 21 CFR 178.3620 (a) and 21 CFR 172.878 European Pharmacopoeia and USA FDA 21 CFR 178.3620 (a) and 21 CFR 172.878
